triggerCondition: bound tuple differs from active tuple
safeSummary: The active policy tuple changed and the bound evaluation is no longer current.
Routing policy currently blocks network progression.
Routing policy requires urgent return instead of hub progression.
The case is outside the lawful offer window for this tuple.
The case is outside the required window and remains visible only as a governed explanation.

triggerCondition: service obligation disposition resolves to make_up_required
safeSummary: The tuple requires make-up action for cancelled or missing minutes.

triggerCondition: service obligation disposition resolves to obligation_risk
safeSummary: The current minutes or supply facts place the network under obligation risk.

triggerCondition: practice visibility disposition resolves to visibility_restricted
safeSummary: Practice visibility generation is restricted under the current minimum-necessary contract.

triggerCondition: practice visibility disposition resolves to ack_debt_open
safeSummary: Practice acknowledgement debt remains open under the current tuple.

triggerCondition: practice visibility disposition resolves to delta_required
safeSummary: A practice visibility delta must be generated before this scope is complete.

triggerCondition: capacity admission disposition resolves to degraded_callback_only
safeSummary: Only callback-only reasoning is lawful for the current degraded capacity state.

triggerCondition: capacity admission disposition resolves to degraded_diagnostic_only
safeSummary: Only diagnostic-only visibility is lawful for the current degraded capacity state.

triggerCondition: capacity admission disposition resolves to quarantined_excluded
safeSummary: Quarantined capacity is excluded from ordinary patient offer and direct commit.

triggerCondition: capacity admission disposition resolves to stale_capacity
safeSummary: Stale capacity prevents ordinary progression under the current tuple.

triggerCondition: capacity admission disposition resolves to missing_capacity
safeSummary: No capacity is currently admissible for the evaluated scope.
